commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d67ea7ac4d52e2db749abe1a3711415e85e85ff0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the bundled Codex agent harness default source visible reply mode from `message_tool` to `automatic` and updates two Codex plugin test expectations.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current `main` shows the Codex harness defaulting to `message_tool`, the resolver converting that to `message_tool_only` for direct/source chats, and tests asserting no visible final send when config is unset. I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need to decide whether this hotfix should intentionally change existing no-config Codex delivery before any repair automation makes sense.

target.title: hotfix(codex): default visible replies to automatic
target.body:
## Summary
Switch the Codex harness default visible reply mode from `message_tool` to `automatic`.

This makes direct-chat reply delivery behave as expected unless an explicit config override is present.

## Why
The Codex harness was introduced with `sourceVisibleReplies: "message_tool"`, which caused reply delivery behavior that did not match expected direct Telegram chat behavior.

This hotfix changes the default to `automatic` and updates the harness tests to match.

## Testing
- Updated Codex plugin tests to assert `automatic`
- Verified the change is limited to the Codex harness default and matching tests
target.author: vice-magus-faolan
